items.title: GSC enrichment stores raw query signal as candidate evidence
items.precondition: Repo checkout after Rev 2 candidate-flow change
items.expected: New GSC rows are saved as candidate rows, duplicates refresh last_seen_at, and raw GSC rows are not harvestable unless bootstrap approves them
items.evidence: Focused market-intelligence tests passed: 6 files / 12 tests.

items.title: Bootstrap owns AI approval and archives stale generated keywords
steps: 1. Run GSC enrichment, bootstrap, and DataForSEO harvest for orgs 5, 8, and 39
items.expected: Approved rows are only the latest AI-denoised market_intelligence_agent rows; raw GSC rows remain candidate; stale generated rows are archived
items.evidence: Final source/status counts: Garrison 185 approved / 1034 GSC candidates / 46 archived; Artful 195 approved / 608 GSC candidates / 84 archived; One Endodontics 892 approved / 2317 GSC candidates / 378 archived.

items.title: DataForSEO harvest uses local provider locations and avoids rate-limit failures
items.precondition: DATAFORSEO credentials configured in local development env
steps: 1. Run harvestMarketSearchVolumeForOrganization for orgs 5, 8, and 39 with reportMonth 2026-06-01
2. Query approved keyword rows and joined June volume rows
items.expected: Every approved keyword has a June volume row, no batch fails, and no approved row uses United States as the provider location when a local market is available
items.evidence: Final rerun: Garrison 185/185 rows, Artful 195/195 rows, One Endodontics 892/892 rows, 0 failed batches. approved_united_states_rows = 0.
items.notes: Added DataForSEO batch throttling after a local rerun hit provider task code 40202.

items.title: Final local first-card values are queryable for June 2026
items.precondition: Final local harvest completed for reportMonth 2026-06-01
steps: 1. Query approved market keywords joined to market_keyword_search_volume for report_month 2026-06-01
2. Sum search_volume per organization and location
items.expected: The Patient Journey first card can read the local June market opportunity totals
items.evidence: Org totals: Garrison 720, Artful 540, One Endodontics 1370. One Endodontics location totals: Falls Church 220, Gainesville 180, Fredericksburg 430, Sterling 280, Woodbridge 260.
items.notes: Values are DataForSEO monthly local-market estimates, not month-to-date observed searches.

items.title: Backend build, tests, lint, and constitution checks pass
items.precondition: Repo checkout after implementation and local rerun
items.expected: TypeScript and tests pass; convention strict has no hard violations; lint has no errors
items.evidence: npx tsc --noEmit passed. npm test -- --run passed 17 files / 83 tests. check:conventions --strict passed with 0 clear structural violations. npm run lint exited 0 with existing warnings only.

items.title: Legacy rank-keyword search-volume job is retired
items.precondition: Rev 6 cleanup task is implemented after Search Opportunity has moved to market_keyword_search_volume
steps: 1. Inspect src/workers/worker.ts for harvest-search-volume worker registration and monthly-search-volume-harvest schedule registration
2. Confirm the existing BullMQ repeatable key for monthly-search-volume-harvest is removed or covered by a startup cleanup/script
items.expected: The legacy harvest-search-volume worker path no longer runs DataForSEO calls, no stale repeatable job remains in Redis, and the new market-intelligence monthly refresh remains active
items.evidence: worker.ts no longer imports, registers, handles, closes, or schedules the legacy harvest-search-volume worker. src/workers/processors/searchVolumeHarvest.processor.ts was deleted. Local Redis cleanup check returned before=0, removed=0, remainingLegacy=0. npx tsc --noEmit passed. Targeted market-intelligence and Patient Journey tests passed: 7 files / 24 tests. npm run check:conventions -- --strict passed with 0 clear structural violations.
items.notes: The remaining monthly DataForSEO path is monthly-market-intelligence-refresh on harvest-market-intelligence. Historical keyword_search_volume rows, model, and adapter remain intact.
